text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a dance lesson with Hishi Akebono...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwip! Swoosh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! ☆ How was my dance, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I thought so! I worked some sumo-type moves
into the choreography!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yep! Sumo wrestlers look so strong when they move. They're really fun to watch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to make my fans happy with performances
that are just as dynamic and entertaining as sumo
matches! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... it feels like I'm nowhere near as
impressive as a real sumo wrestler yet...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what I can do to make my performances
even more dynamic?
choice_data_list: Be bold and stand at the front of the stage!
Get your fans up on stage!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The front of the stage? Oh, I get it! If I'm right at
the front, then I'll definitely make a bigger
impression!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to try it out! I'll dash forward
really fast, so make sure you're watching my
buono dance from your ringside seat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aaand, hi-yah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Dosukoi! ☆ Dosukoi! ☆ Backward pivot, THROW!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono comes so close that I can't make
out what she's doing... Still, it feels so immersive
that I don't really mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Fans... up on the stage, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, okay! If I dance with a fan face-to-face, it'll
be like we're actually in a wrestling match, and
that's sure to make an impact! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Quick, get up here, Trainer. Okay, now let's
grapple and dance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Forward thrust! ♪ Palm strike! ♪ Dosukoi-koi!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Blam! Crash!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, you're out! Is this a win for wrestler
Akebono?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go flying off the stage. But actually, I can see
her fans enjoying interactions like this every once
in a while.
